title: Never Split the Difference
author: Chris Voss
description: Master FBI-tested negotiation tactics through 5 Claude Code skills that teach tactical empathy, mirroring, labeling, calibrated questions, and the Ackerman bargaining model.
longDescription: Former FBI hostage negotiator Chris Voss reveals field-tested techniques for high-stakes negotiations. These 5 skills distill the core methods — tactical empathy to understand counterparts, mirroring to build rapport, labeling to defuse emotions, calibrated questions to guide outcomes, and the Ackerman model to close deals — into actionable frameworks you can apply to any conversation where the outcome matters.
